joyful.title: 1. The Annunciation
joyful.text:
Humility

Mary receives God's will with a humble heart. May we pray with the same openness, trusting that every grace begins with surrender.

joyful.title: 2. The Visitation
joyful.text:
Love of Neighbor

Mary goes quickly to serve Elizabeth. May we notice who needs our help today and respond with generous love.

joyful.title: 3. The Nativity of the Lord
joyful.text:
Poverty of Spirit

Jesus is born in simplicity. May we hold earthly things lightly and make room for the riches of God.

joyful.title: 4. The Presentation
joyful.text:
Obedience

Mary and Joseph bring Jesus to the temple in faith. May we obey God with quiet trust: not my will, but Yours be done.

joyful.title: 5. Finding of the Child Jesus
joyful.text:
Piety

Jesus is found in His Father's house. May we seek Him faithfully in prayer, worship, and the sacraments.

sorrowful.title: 1. Agony in the Garden
sorrowful.text:
Contrition, Conformity to the Will of God

Jesus prays in anguish and still surrenders to the Father. May we bring Him our fear and accept God's will with love.

sorrowful.title: 2. Scourging at the Pillar
sorrowful.text:
Purity, Mortification

Jesus suffers for our sins. May our small sacrifices purify our hearts and unite us more closely to Him.

sorrowful.title: 3. Crowning with Thorns
sorrowful.text:
Moral Courage

Jesus endures mockery without turning from the truth. May we stand with Him when faith costs us comfort or approval.

sorrowful.title: 4. Carrying of the Cross
sorrowful.text:
Patience

Jesus carries the cross step by step. May we bear our daily burdens patiently and follow Him with steady hearts.

sorrowful.title: 5. The Crucifixion
sorrowful.text:
Salvation, Self-Denial

Jesus gives Himself completely for our salvation. May the cross teach us gratitude, mercy, and self-giving love.

glorious.title: 1. The Resurrection
glorious.text:
Faith

Jesus rises from the dead and opens the way to life. Lord, strengthen our faith and help our unbelief.

glorious.title: 2. The Ascension
glorious.text:
Hope, Desire for Heaven

Jesus ascends to the Father and prepares our home. May heavenly hope guide how we live on earth.

glorious.title: 3. The Descent of the Holy Spirit
glorious.text:
Wisdom, Love of God

The Holy Spirit fills fearful hearts with courage. Come, Holy Spirit, give us wisdom and a deeper love of God.

glorious.title: 4. The Assumption of Mary
glorious.text:
Devotion to Mary

Mary is taken body and soul into heaven. May her closeness to Jesus draw us nearer to Him.

glorious.title: 5. Coronation of the Blessed Virgin Mary
glorious.text:
Eternal Happiness

Mary reigns with her Son in glory. May we seek the joy of heaven and remain faithful to the end.

luminous.title: 1. The Baptism of Jesus
luminous.text:
Openness to the Holy Spirit

At the Jordan, the Spirit descends on Jesus. May we live from the grace of our baptism and welcome the Spirit's help.

luminous.title: 2. The Miracle at Cana
luminous.text:
To Jesus through Mary

Mary points the servants to Jesus: 'Do whatever he tells you.' May we follow her counsel with trust.

luminous.title: 3. Proclamation of the Kingdom of God
luminous.text:
Repentance, Trust in God

Jesus proclaims the Kingdom and calls us to repent. May we turn from sin and trust the mercy of God.

luminous.title: 4. The Transfiguration
luminous.text:
Desire for Holiness

Jesus reveals His glory on the mountain. May we desire holiness more than anything the world can offer.

luminous.title: 5. Institution of the Eucharist
luminous.text:
Eucharistic Adoration, Active Participation at Mass

Jesus gives us Himself in the Eucharist. May we receive this gift with reverence and love.
